items.headline_en: LangGraph release feed now shows langgraph-checkpoint==4.0.3
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for LangGraph changed and the newest visible tag is langgraph-checkpoint==4.0.3. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-27T14:34:20Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
items.evidence_excerpt: title=langgraph-checkpoint==4.0.3 updated=2026-04-27T14:34:20Z link=https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph/releases/tag/checkpoint%3D%3D4.0.3 summary= content=Changes since checkpoint==4.0.2 release(checkpoint): 4.0.3 ( #7625 ) fix(checkpoint): revive lc=2 JSON blobs for safe types without allowlist ( #7582 ) chore: dedup warnings ( #7257 ) chore(deps): bump langsmith from 0.6.4 to 0.7.31 in /libs/checkpoint ( #7525 )

content=Changes since checkpoint==4.0.1 release(checkpoint): 4.0.2 ( #7518 ) docs: document LANGGRAPH_STRICT_MSGPACK for checkpoint security ( #7517 ) chore(deps): bump pytest from 9.0.2 to 9.0.3 in /libs/checkpoint ( #7506 ) chore(deps): bump langchain-core from 1.2.23 to 1.2.28 in /libs/checkpoint ( #7453 ) chore(deps): bump the minor-and-patch group in /libs/checkpoint with 3 updates ( #7373 ) chore(deps): bump pygments from 2.19.2 to 2.20.0 in /libs/checkpoint ( #7348 ) chore(deps): bump the minor-and-patch group in /libs/checkpoint with 2 updates ( #7292 ) chore(deps): bump requests from 2.32.5 to 2.33.0 in /libs/checkpoint ( #7285 ) chore(deps): bump the all-dependencies group in /libs/checkpoint with 2 updates ( #7250 ) chore(deps): bump the all-dependencies group in /libs/checkpoint with 2 updates ( #7198 ) chore(deps): bump orjson from 3.11.5 to 3.11.6 in /libs/checkpoint ( #7146 ) fix(checkpoint): don't add the task to the checkpoint batch if it was… ( #7168 ) chore(deps): bump the all-dependencies group across 1 directory with 4 updates ( #7074 )

-content=Changes since 1.1.7a1 chore(deps): bump pytest from 9.0.2 to 9.0.3 in /libs/langgraph ( #7507 ) release(langgraph): 1.1.7a2 ( #7511 ) chore: allow passing some metadata only for tracing purposes ( #7383 ) fix: populate assistant_id from config configurable instead of metadata ( #7468 )
